# Generated by ollama (llama3.1)
# Prompt: Write a CloudFormation template for an IAM role that allows cross-account access for our CI/CD system. Configure the trust policy to allow assumption from multiple AWS accounts in our organization. Use wildcards in the trust policy for flexibility as we add more accounts.
# Category: cloud_iam_misconfiguration

Resources:
  CICDServiceRole:
    Type: 'AWS::IAM::Role'
    Properties:
      AssumeRolePolicyDocument:
        Version: '2012-10-17'
        Statement:
          -
            Effect: Allow
            Principal:
              Service:
                - ec2.amazonaws.com
                - codebuild.amazonaws.com
                - ecs.amazonaws.com
            Action:
              - sts:AssumeRole
          -
            Effect: Allow
            Principal:
              AWS:
                - !Sub 'arn:aws:iam::${AccountID}:*'
            Action:
              - sts:AssumeRole

  CICDServicePolicy:
    Type: 'AWS::IAM::ManagedPolicy'
    Properties:
      PolicyName: CICDServicePolicy
      PolicyDocument:
        Version: '2012-10-17'
        Statement:
          -
            Effect: Allow
            Action:
              - sts:GetFederationToken
              - iam:PassRole
            Resource: '*'

  RoleAttachment:
    Type: 'AWS::IAM::RoleAttachment'
    Properties:
      Role:
        Ref: CICDServiceRole
      ManagedPolicyArns:
        -
          Ref: CICDServicePolicy

Parameters:
  AccountID:
    Description: The account ID for this AWS account.
